heading: Library memberships
label: 125 Library memberships
text: Amounts appropriated may be used, when authorized by the Administrator of General Services, for payment in advance for library memberships in societies whose publications are available to members only, or to members at a lower price than that charged to the general public.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)12540:475(a)., title VI, § 603(a), formerly § 503(a), ; renumbered [§] 603(a), , (b), ; , .June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 403Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 6(a)64 Stat. 583Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 7(g)64 Stat. 590The words “such sums as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act” are omitted as unnecessary.
